mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(ps.name, '未分类') AS name, COUNT(p.id) AS value FROM parrot p LEFT JOIN parrot_species ps ON p.species_id = ps.id GROUP BY ps.name ORDER BY value DESC
SELECT COALESCE(health_status, '未知') AS name, COUNT(id) AS value FROM parrot GROUP BY health_status ORDER BY value DESC

SELECT DATE_FORMAT(appointment_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS name, COUNT(id) AS value FROM appointment WHERE appointment_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY appointment_date ORDER BY appointment_date ASC
